checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~65,397 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 5% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 17 — moderately nested
CSS class attributes consume ~8,786 tokens (13% of page)
Reading this page costs $0.08–$0.98 per load ($0.41–$4.90 for a 5-page session)

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, contentinfo, main, navigation
All 26 images have alt attributes (25 descriptive, 1 decorative)
No skip links found — agents must traverse entire page to find content
No ARIA live regions — dynamic content changes may be invisible to agents
2 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)
